banner.trialDaysLeft: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} of full access left
banner.freeText: You are on the Standard plan — AI signals, Edge Finder and broker sync are PRO features

dashboard.subtitle: Your trading performance, in real time.
dashboard.addFirstTrade: Add your first trade to start tracking your progress.

edge.subtitle: The statistical engine that shows you exactly where you make and lose money — by symbol, setup, killzone, day, hour and duration.
edge.emptyTitle: You need at least 10 closed trades in the selected period
edge.emptyDesc: Edge Finder gets more precise as your journal grows. Sync your broker account or add trades — then come back here.
edge.emptyHint: You can also add trades manually, from the Trades page.
edge.summary: Analysis over {count} closed trades. Only patterns with at least 5 occurrences are shown — the rest lack statistical significance.
edge.leaksHint: — this is where you systematically lose money
edge.noEdges: No profitable pattern with a sufficient sample yet.
edge.paywallDesc: The statistical engine that shows you exactly where you make and lose money — by symbol, setup, killzone, day and hour.
edge.pw1: Your profitable edges, statistically proven (min. 5 occurrences)
edge.pw2: The leaks draining your account, identified automatically
edge.pw3: Analysis across 10 dimensions: symbol, setup, killzone, day, hour, duration, tag
edge.pw4: Updates with every new trade in your journal

monteCarlo.title: Monte Carlo Simulator
monteCarlo.subtitle: 10,000 alternative lives of your account, built from your REAL returns. Learn the probability of passing a prop firm challenge — before paying for it.
monteCarlo.emptyTitle: You need at least 10 closed trades
monteCarlo.emptyDesc: The simulation uses the REAL distribution of your results — the more trades in your journal, the more reliable the probabilities.
monteCarlo.emptyHint: After syncing, come back and run the simulation.
monteCarlo.base: Base: {count} real trades · 10,000 simulations · resampling with replacement
monteCarlo.pRuin: risk of hitting {dd}% drawdown (failing the challenge)
monteCarlo.pNeither: neither target nor ruin within {trades} trades
monteCarlo.equityTitle: Where your account ends up after {trades} trades (final equity)
monteCarlo.ddNote: Average max drawdown per simulation: {dd}% · Green = above target · Indigo = in profit · Red = in loss
monteCarlo.disclaimer: ⚠️ The simulation assumes the future statistically resembles your past and that trades are independent. It is not a prediction — it is a risk-understanding tool. Past results do not guarantee future results.
monteCarlo.paywallDesc: Learn the probability of passing a prop firm challenge BEFORE paying for it — based on your real results.
monteCarlo.pw1: 10,000 simulations on the real distribution of your trades
monteCarlo.pw2: Probability of hitting the target vs. risk of failing the challenge
monteCarlo.pw4: Configurable parameters: target, max drawdown, number of trades

billing.title: Subscription & Billing
billing.subtitle: Your plan, what each package includes and payment management — all in one place.
billing.statusEnding: Ends on {date} — you can reactivate anytime from the portal
billing.statusTrial: Full PRO access · {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} left (until {date})
billing.statusFree: Journal, academy and basic analytics — free forever
billing.f3: Analytics, lot calculator, checklist, calendar, news
billing.f9: Edge Finder — where you win and lose, statistically
billing.f10: Monte Carlo Simulator (prop firm challenge probability)
billing.faq1Body: We never store your card details. Payment, invoices and payment method are managed in the secure Stripe portal.
billing.faq2Body: No contracts, no minimum periods. When you cancel, you keep PRO until the end of the paid period.
billing.faq3Body: Nothing is deleted when you move to Standard: your journal, statistics and Academy progress are waiting exactly as you left them.

alertsPage.title: AI Alerts
alertsPage.subtitle: Intelligent protection against trading mistakes.
alertsPage.configDesc: Enable all alerts for maximum protection. The AI monitors your trading behavior in real time and warns you before you make a costly mistake.
alertsPage.d1: Alert when you exceed your maximum number of trades per day or session.
alertsPage.d2: Automatic detection when you enter emotional trades after a loss.
alertsPage.d3: Alert when the risk per trade exceeds your maximum set percentage.
alertsPage.d4: Notification when the day's losses reach your limit or the prop firm limit.
alertsPage.d5: Alert when you enter trades after big moves without a valid setup.
alertsPage.d6: Notification after 3+ consecutive losses so you take a break.
alertsPage.d7: Alert 30 minutes before major-impact economic events.
alertsPage.d8: Notification when the account drawdown exceeds the set threshold.

propFirmPage.subtitle: Monitor your challenge rules in real time — profit, daily loss, drawdown, minimum days.
propFirmPage.empty: Add a Challenge or Live account from the Accounts section to track prop firm rules.
propFirmPage.disclaimer: Presets are indicative — check your program's exact rules. Drawdown is computed from the equity curve of recorded trades.

notifications.connectedDesc: We sent you a confirmation message on Telegram.
notifications.cardDesc: Get risk and discipline alerts directly on Telegram, in real time.
notifications.botNotConfigured: The Telegram bot is not yet enabled on the server. Contact the administrator.
notifications.step1: Open Telegram and search for @userinfobot — it sends you your Chat ID.
notifications.step2: Search for the TradeGx bot and press Start.
notifications.step3: Enter your Chat ID below and connect.
notifications.nOvertradingD: Alert when you exceed the daily trade limit
notifications.nRevengeD: Alert when you open a trade shortly after a loss
notifications.nFomoD: Alert when you enter too late relative to the setup zone
notifications.nRiskExceededD: Alert when position size exceeds the configured risk
notifications.nDailyLossD: Alert at 80%, 95% and 100% of the daily limit
notifications.nMondayRestrictionD: Alert on Monday morning trading attempts
notifications.nDailyReviewD: Daily summary with discipline score and notes

apiKeys.descMetaapi: Automatic MT4/MT5 trade sync from your broker
apiKeys.descTwelvedata: Live prices, quotes and real-time market data
apiKeys.descStripe: Subscription management — handled automatically by the platform

apiKeys.cardDesc: Connect your brokers and external services. Keys are encrypted and masked after saving.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

importDialog.title: Import CSV
importDialog.accountLabel: Trades will be imported into account:
importDialog.accountWarn: ⚠️ Make sure you select the correct account before importing.
importDialog.step4: In Excel: File → Save As → choose type CSV (Comma delimited)

importDialog.clickSelect: Click to select the CSV file

importDialog.errSelect: Select an account and a valid CSV file
importDialog.importDoneDesc: {imported} trades imported{hasErrors, select, true{, {errors} skipped} other{}}.
importDialog.fileNotSupported: The file “{name}” is not supported. You need a .CSV file exported from MT4 or MT5.
importDialog.filePdfBinary: The file appears to be a PDF or binary, not CSV. Export from MT4/MT5 as a .CSV file.

signals.title: AI Signals
signals.subtitle: {date} · max 3 high-probability setups
signals.disclaimerTitle: Warning — this is not financial advice
signals.disclaimerBody: Signals are generated by artificial intelligence based on technical analysis and are purely <edu>educational and informational</edu>. They do not constitute financial or investment advice or a recommendation to trade. Trading financial markets involves a <risk>high risk of capital loss</risk>. No signal has a 100% success rate — past performance does not guarantee future results. Do your own analysis, manage your risk and never trade with money you cannot afford to lose. Trading decisions are entirely your own.
signals.analyzing: The AI is analyzing the markets...
signals.analyzingSub: Identifying the best setups of the day. Takes ~10-20 seconds.
signals.emptyBody: The AI did not identify clear enough market conditions. Quality over quantity — sometimes the best trade is to wait.

aiChat.qa1: Fully analyze my performance over the last 30 days
aiChat.qa2: What is the weakest aspect of my trading?
aiChat.qa3: Why is my profit factor low?
aiChat.qa4: Compare my wins with my losses
aiChat.qr1: How do I improve my risk management?
aiChat.qr2: Calculate the optimal risk per trade for my account
aiChat.qr3: Analyze the distribution of my losses
aiChat.qr4: Am I over-leveraged on any instrument?
aiChat.qp1: What psychological mistakes do I make most often?
aiChat.qp2: How do I avoid revenge trading?
aiChat.qp3: Why do I cut profits too early?
aiChat.qp4: How do I improve discipline and patience?
aiChat.qs1: What is my most profitable setup?
aiChat.qs2: At what hours and sessions do I get the best results?
aiChat.mpGen1: Fully analyze my trader profile and tell me where I stand
aiChat.mpGen2: What is the most important thing I need to improve right now?
aiChat.mpGen3: Summarize my performance and give me an action plan for this week
aiChat.mpGen4: What pattern of mistakes repeats most often in my trading?
aiChat.mpGen5: Am I ready to move to a live account or do I still have work to do?
aiChat.mpPerf1: Give me a detailed breakdown of my stats — what works and what does not
aiChat.mpPerf2: On which instrument and session do I get the best results?
aiChat.mpPerf3: Compare my win rate with my R:R — are they balanced?
aiChat.mpPerf4: What are my most profitable setups and why?
aiChat.mpPerf5: Analyze my P&L distribution — do I have consistent or sporadic gains?
aiChat.mpRisk1: Calculate the optimal risk per trade based on my current account
aiChat.mpRisk2: Am I over-leveraged on any instrument in my history?
aiChat.mpRisk3: How do I set a better stop-loss without being stopped out prematurely?
aiChat.mpRisk4: Analyze my biggest drawdowns — what went wrong?
aiChat.mpRisk5: What is the maximum recommended position size for my account?
aiChat.mpPsych1: What psychological mistakes do I make most often in my trading?
aiChat.mpPsych2: How do I recognize and stop revenge trading in real time?
aiChat.mpPsych3: Why do I cut profits too early and how do I fix it?
aiChat.mpPsych4: How do I manage a losing streak without hurting my discipline?
aiChat.mpPsych5: Create a pre-trading ritual for me to enter with a clear mind
aiChat.mpStrat1: Analyze my SMC/ICT setups — which have better confluences?
aiChat.mpStrat2: How do I identify valid vs. invalid Order Blocks on the chart?
aiChat.mpStrat3: Which killzone should I trade based on my symbols?
aiChat.mpStrat4: Explain how to use Fair Value Gaps for a more precise entry
aiChat.mpStrat5: How do I combine BOS + ChoCH + OB for a high-probability setup?
aiChat.subtitle: TradeGX AI Coach — ready to help you
aiChat.aiRealtime: The AI has access to all this data in real time.
aiChat.wrLow: Win rate below 45% — analyze with AI
aiChat.pfLow: Profit factor below 1.0 — you are losing money
aiChat.accLoss: Account at a loss vs. deposit
aiChat.tipPf: A low profit factor suggests you let losses run or cut winners too early. Ask the AI about trailing stops.
aiChat.tipWr: A win rate below 50% is fine if R:R is high. Ask the AI to analyze your R:R distribution.
aiChat.tipSolid: Solid performance! Ask the AI which setups should be scaled more aggressively.
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask something about your trading... (Enter = send)
aiChat.connFailed: ⚠️ The connection failed. Check your Anthropic API key.
